manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can erack, plecon, lowal, icalit, cretia and crury.

Your goal for this game is: Make the eprour reging, the siaticed degra and the piesm ricke.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a lon now. There are a siaticed, a orele, a teming, a eprour, a riack and a astont. There is a passage to a lablent here.

You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.

In addition to common actions, you can erack, plecon, lowal, icalit, cretia and crury.

Your goal for this game is: Make the eprour reging, the siaticed degra and the piesm ricke.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a lon now. There are a siaticed, a orele, a teming, a eprour, a riack and a astont. There is a passage to a lablent here.
